summary: Iteration 13 - Verified playback bug fixes: local audio progress bar now advances correctly, seek functionality works, duration displays properly (4:05 for TABATA mixes). All 12 backend API tests passed. All frontend pages load correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/mixes - returns mixes with duration field (245 seconds = 4:05)
PUT /api/spotify/transfer - validates device_id parameter (returns 400 for missing)
PUT /api/spotify/transfer - returns 401 when Spotify not connected
GET /api/spotify/search - returns Spotify tracks with correct structure
Frontend login page loads and login works
Frontend songs page shows songs with duration (4:05)
Frontend: clicking a song starts playback - player bar shows song name, artist, and duration
Frontend: progress bar advances during playback (0:00 -> 0:01 -> 0:02)
Frontend: progress bar is seekable (clicked at 50% -> jumped to 2:02)
Frontend: timer display matches audio position
Frontend: Spotify 'Conectar' button exists on profile page
Frontend: playlists page loads correctly (shows Cardio Vibes 2026)
Frontend: class mode page loads correctly (shows HIIT Session 30min with 2 canciones)
critical_code_review_comments: Progress bar fix verified: requestAnimationFrame loop in MainLayout.js (lines 75-91) updates currentTime smoothly
getValidDuration() fallback working: uses audio element duration if valid, otherwise falls back to mix metadata duration
Seek functionality working: onChange handler on range input correctly updates audio.currentTime
SpotifyProvider re-checks connection when user auth changes (useEffect on line 131-139)
getOAuthToken in SDK now fetches fresh tokens to prevent stale token issues
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 verified the playback bug fixes: 1) Local audio progress bar now advances correctly using requestAnimationFrame loop. 2) Duration displays correctly (4:05 for TABATA mixes) using getValidDuration() with fallback to mix metadata. 3) Seek functionality works - clicking on progress bar jumps to correct position. 4) SpotifyProvider re-checks connection after login. 5) All backend APIs working. 6) All frontend pages load correctly. Note: Spotify SDK playback requires real Premium account - code structure verified but cannot test actual audio.

features_verified.local_audio_progress_bar: WORKING - advances from 0:00 toward 4:05 during playback
features_verified.seek_functionality: WORKING - clicking at 50% of progress bar jumps to 2:02
features_verified.timer_sync: WORKING - currentTime updates match audio position
features_verified.spotify_connection_button: PRESENT - green 'Conectar' button on profile page
features_verified.class_mode_page: WORKING - shows HIIT Session 30min with 2 canciones

bugs_fixed_this_iteration: Progress bar not advancing - FIXED via requestAnimationFrame loop
Duration showing 0:00 - FIXED via getValidDuration() fallback to mix metadata
Timer desynced with audio - VERIFIED SYNCED
spotify_playback_note: Spotify SDK requires real Premium account. Code structure verified: SpotifyProvider re-checks on auth change, getOAuthToken fetches fresh tokens, transferPlayback called on SDK ready. Cannot test actual Spotify audio without Premium.
